changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/mention-pill.tsx:63,65`

```ts
const color = entity ? getStr(entity, "color", "888888") : "888888";
getStr(entity, "description") || undefined
```

Assumes all mentionable entities have `"color"` and `"description"` fields. Entity schemas should declare which fields provide color and description for mention rendering (e.g. a `mention_color_field` property).
